targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rmm_devices
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rmm_devices WHERE is_online = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rmm_devices WHERE is_online = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rmm_events WHERE severity IN ('high','critical') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT
  name, hostname, ip_address, os_name,
  group_name, project, is_online,
  cpu_usage, memory_usage, disk_usage,
  TO_CHAR(last_seen, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_seen
FROM rmm_devices
ORDER BY is_online DESC, name ASC

SELECT
  severity,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM rmm_events
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY severity
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  severity,
  event_type,
  hostname,
  group_name,
  project,
  details
FROM rmm_events
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "All Events"
FROM rmm_events
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Critical/High"
FROM rmm_events
WHERE severity IN ('critical','high')
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_agents WHERE is_revoked = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_agents WHERE is_connected = TRUE AND is_revoked = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_agents WHERE is_connected = FALSE AND is_revoked = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_patches WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_patches WHERE status = 'applied' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM mesh_patches WHERE status IN ('failed','rolled_back') AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT
  CASE WHEN a.is_connected THEN '🟢 online' ELSE '🔴 offline' END AS status,
  a.app_name,
  a.hostname,
  a.sentinel_env AS env,
  LEFT(a.git_sha, 10) AS git_sha,
  h.cpu_pct,
  h.mem_pct,
  h.disk_pct,
  h.http_status,
  h.process_up,
  TO_CHAR(a.last_seen, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_seen,
  a.agent_id
FROM mesh_agents a
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT cpu_pct, mem_pct, disk_pct, http_status, process_up
  FROM mesh_heartbeats
  WHERE agent_id = a.agent_id
  ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 1
) h ON TRUE
WHERE a.is_revoked = FALSE
ORDER BY a.is_connected DESC, a.app_name ASC

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at,
  a.app_name,
  p.triggered_by,
  p.status,
  p.approved_by,
  p.patch_id
FROM mesh_patches p
JOIN mesh_agents a ON a.agent_id = p.agent_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 30

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', h.received_at) AS time,
  a.app_name AS metric,
  AVG(h.cpu_pct) AS value
FROM mesh_heartbeats h
JOIN mesh_agents a ON a.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', h.received_at) AS time,
  a.app_name AS metric,
  AVG(h.mem_pct) AS value
FROM mesh_heartbeats h
JOIN mesh_agents a ON a.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(l.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  a.app_name,
  l.direction,
  l.message_type,
  l.sig_valid,
  ROUND(l.ts_drift_ms::numeric, 1) AS ts_drift_ms
FROM mesh_audit_log l
LEFT JOIN mesh_agents a ON a.agent_id = l.agent_id
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE source='sentry-triage' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sentry_issues WHERE status='resolved' AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sentry_issues WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','ignored')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sentry_issues WHERE level IN ('critical','fatal') AND status NOT IN ('resolved','ignored')
SELECT TO_CHAR(received_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS received_at, level, title, project, count, status FROM sentry_issues ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT detail->>'subreddit') AS value FROM ai_milestones WHERE action='reddit_digest' AND triggered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM ai_milestones WHERE action='reddit_digest' AND triggered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM ai_milestones WHERE action='reddit_digest' AND triggered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT TO_CHAR(triggered_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS triggered_at, action, intent, detail->>'subreddit' AS subreddit, summary, agent FROM ai_milestones WHERE action='reddit_digest' OR intent LIKE 'reddit%' ORDER BY triggered_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM github_repo_monitors WHERE enabled = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM github_issues WHERE state = 'open'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM github_issues WHERE triage_status = 'patched' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT g.repo, g.label, g.enabled, m.app_name AS agent, m.hostname, TO_CHAR(g.last_polled_at,'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_polled FROM github_repo_monitors g LEFT JOIN mesh_agents m ON g.agent_id = m.agent_id ORDER BY g.repo

SELECT TO_CHAR(gi.received_at,'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS received, gi.repo, gi.issue_number, LEFT(gi.title, 60) AS title, gi.triage_status, gi.pr_url FROM github_issues gi ORDER BY gi.received_at DESC LIMIT 20
